titles.title: That's Just His Way of Telling Me He Loves Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He lets me walk down roads of disappointment He watches and He knows what's best for me. My greatest strength comes through my darkest trials; And my greatest joy is knowing that He can trust in me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: That's just His way of telling me He loves me; Love beyond all human understanding. I won't question trials that bring me to my knees; That's just His way of telling me He loves me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If I'm successful walking in this valley, He'll give me strength to climb the highest hill. The more I try, the better He can mold me; Change my life completely to fit His perfect will.
